nasb.text: They took possession of his land and the land of Og king of Bashan, the two kings of the Amorites, who were across the Jordan to the east,

esv.text: And they took possession of his land and the land of Og, the king of Bashan, the two kings of the Amorites, who lived to the east beyond the Jordan;

cnv.text: 他們佔領了他的地和巴珊王噩的地，就是兩個亞摩利人的王，是住在約旦河東，日出的方向的；

ccb.text: 占领了他的土地，还占领了巴珊王噩的土地。西宏和噩是约旦河东亚摩利人的两个王，
